title: Feelings & Friends
description: Name emotions, practice kindness, and learn to share.

title: Color Play
description: Explore colors, shapes, and textures through art.

title: Counting Corner
description: Count, sort, and discover shapes through play.

title: Music Garden
description: Sing, clap, and move to the beat.

title: Step by Step
description: Learn sequencing and cause-and-effect through play.

title: Wonder Lab
description: Observe nature and discover how things work.

title: Story Time
description: Explore letters, rhymes, and stories together.

title: Think & Play
description: Sort, match, and solve simple puzzles.

title: Lines & Patterns
description: Discover different types of lines, repeating patterns, and symmetry!

title: Colors & Shapes
description: Learn rainbow colors, basic shapes, and see them everywhere around you!

title: Place Value & Comparing
description: Discover tens and ones, compare numbers, and find number patterns!

title: Counting & Number Sense
description: Count to 100, learn number order, compare numbers, and skip count by 10s!

title: Addition & Subtraction
description: Add and subtract within 10 and 20 using number bonds, ten frames, and story problems!

title: Shapes & Measurement
description: Explore 2D and 3D shapes, measure lengths, tell time, and find equal parts!

title: Beat & Rhythm
description: Discover steady beats, fast and slow tempos, and fun rhythm patterns!

title: Pitch & Dynamics
description: Explore high and low sounds, loud and soft music, and your first musical notes!

title: Sequences & Loops
description: Master step-by-step instructions and discover the power of repeating patterns!

title: What is Code?
description: Learn what computers are, how to give instructions, and how to find bugs!

title: Earth & Sky
description: Explore the sun, moon, stars, weather, and the four seasons that make our world so amazing!

title: Sound & Light
description: Discover how sounds are made, how light works, and why we see shadows!

title: Plants & Animals
description: Learn about plant parts, what living things need, animal homes, and baby animals!

title: Reading & Comprehension
description: Read short stories and answer questions about what happened!

title: Sentences & Grammar
description: Learn how to build sentences and discover nouns and verbs!

title: Sight Words & Spelling
description: Practice reading and spelling important words you will see everywhere!

title: Phonics Foundations
description: Learn letter sounds, short vowels, and how to blend letters into words!

title: Patterns & Sorting
description: Discover patterns, sort by color and shape, and find what doesn't belong!

title: Sequencing & Logic
description: Put things in order, figure out what happens next, and solve simple puzzles!

title: Pixels & Colors
description: Discover that digital images are made of tiny squares called pixels and learn to mix colors!

title: Patterns & Shapes
description: Create repeating patterns, mirror images, and detailed pixel art characters!

title: Texture & Pattern
description: Explore how things feel and look! Discover textures like rough and smooth, create repeating patterns, and find symmetry all around you!

title: Pixel Art & Digital Creation
description: Discover how digital images are made of tiny colored squares called pixels! Design your own pixel art creations.

title: Art & Feelings
description: Explore how colors and art express emotions! Meet famous artists and create your own feelings artwork.

title: Color Theory & Design
description: Discover color theory, famous artists, and the elements of design!

title: Create & Share
description: Animate your art, explore color moods, connect art to math, and show your work in a gallery!

title: Money & Time
description: Learn to count coins, make change, and tell time like a champ! Master dollars, cents, and clocks!

title: Operations & Place Value
description: Master addition and subtraction, and discover how tens and ones build bigger numbers.

title: Fractions & Geometry
description: Discover equal parts, halves, thirds, and fourths! Plus, explore arrays and repeated addition!

title: Shapes, Measurement & Time
description: Explore 2D shapes, measure things around you, tell time, and put all your math skills together.

title: Skip Counting & Patterns
description: Count by 2s, 5s, and 10s. Discover even and odd numbers!

title: Money & Fractions
description: Learn about coins, counting change, and splitting things into equal parts!

title: Counting & Number Sense
description: Build your counting skills, explore number lines, and discover how numbers connect to each other.

title: Place Value & Comparing
description: Master hundreds, tens, and ones! Read, write, and compare numbers all the way to 1000!

title: Addition & Subtraction Strategies
description: Level up your adding and subtracting skills! Use ten frames, number lines, and clever strategies to solve big problems!

title: Word Problems & Data
description: Become a word problem champion! Solve real-world math puzzles and learn to read graphs!

title: Rhythm & Tempo
description: Explore patterns in music, play with fast and slow tempos, and discover dynamics!

title: Notes & Pitch
description: Meet the musical notes, discover pitch, and learn to keep a steady beat!

title: Rhythm Creation & Performance
description: Create your own rhythms, connect beats to math, and perform in a body percussion concert!

title: Melody & Form
description: Explore high and low notes, learn Do Re Mi, and discover how songs are built with sections!

title: Tempo, Dynamics & Expression
description: Control the speed and volume of music! Learn about fast and slow, loud and soft, and how to play with feeling!

title: Instruments & Notation
description: Meet the instrument families and learn to read simple music!

title: Compose & Perform
description: Write your own songs, learn rhythm notation, connect music to math, and perform for an audience!

title: Events & Conditionals
description: Learn how buttons and sensors make things happen! Discover if-then logic and build a tilt-controlled game.

title: Creative Projects
description: Combine everything you've learned to build amazing programs! Create a digital pet, a reaction timer, a secret message encoder, and more.

title: Hello M5Stick!
description: Meet your M5StickC Plus 2! Learn to light up the display, draw colorful shapes, make buttons do cool things, play music, and put on a light show.

title: Loops & Patterns
description: Learn how loops repeat code so you don't have to! Make blinking lights, repeating melodies, and colorful patterns.

title: DJ Stick!
description: Turn your M5Stick into a musical instrument! Play piano notes with buttons, program songs, and create awesome sound effects!

title: Shake & Count!
description: Discover the motion sensor inside your M5Stick! Detect shakes, count things, roll dice, and build a Magic 8-Ball that predicts the future!

title: Drawing Fun!
description: Become a digital artist! Draw pixel art, combine shapes to make pictures, and create animations that move across the screen.

title: Tilt Games!
description: Use the motion sensor to control what happens on screen! Build a tilt meter, balance a ball, and navigate a simple maze -- all by tilting your M5Stick!

title: Variables & Data
description: Learn about variables -- special containers that store numbers, words, and more! Build counters, name tags, and timers.

title: Earth & Land
description: Explore mountains, rivers, and oceans! Discover how Earth changes slowly and quickly!

title: Sound & Light
description: Discover how sound comes from vibrations and how light creates shadows through fun experiments!

title: Living Things
description: Explore how plants and animals live, grow, and get what they need to survive.

title: Earth & Sky
description: Watch the weather, study the sky, discover heredity, and build a habitat in this earth science adventure.

title: Life Cycles
description: Watch how living things grow and change through their life stages!

title: Matter & Forces
description: Discover solids, liquids, gases, and how pushes and pulls work!

title: Plants & Ecosystems
description: Discover what plants need to grow, how seeds travel, and the amazing world of habitats!

title: Forces & Motion
description: Discover the invisible forces all around you! Push, pull, friction, and gravity make the world move!

title: Phonics & Sounds
description: Discover letter sounds, short vowels, and how to blend letters into words you can read!

title: Grammar & Writing
description: Level up your sentences! Learn about nouns, verbs, adjectives, and punctuation to write like a pro!

title: Informational Text
description: Become a nonfiction expert! Find main ideas, spot text features, and discover what authors are trying to tell us!

title: Comprehension & Stories
description: Understand what you read! Find main ideas, characters, and story parts.

title: Digraphs & Blends
description: Learn special letter teams like sh, ch, th, and consonant blends!

title: Sentences & Stories
description: Put words together into sentences, sequence stories, and read with comprehension.

title: Words & Spelling
description: Build your word power with sight words, rhyming families, and spelling practice.

title: Patterns & Data
description: Discover growing patterns, decode complex sequences, read picture graphs, collect data, and become a data detective!

title: Real-World Problem Solving
description: Tackle big problems by breaking them into small steps! Learn to estimate, plan, and check your answers.

title: Logic & Reasoning
description: Become a logic detective! Use clues, spot patterns, and solve brain-teasing puzzles with Chip.

title: Algorithms & Solutions
description: Give instructions to a robot, find the odd one out, solve creative challenges, and complete the Puzzle Quest!

title: Logic & Reasoning
description: Think about cause and effect, break big problems into small steps, and navigate mazes!

title: Strategy Toolbox
description: Learn powerful strategies: guess and check, work backward, and more!

title: Patterns & Sequences
description: Spot patterns, sequence events, and learn to sort things into groups like a detective!
